channel.title: Welcome to Felmdrav theme for Hugo! on Felmdrav - A Hugo Theme
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome to Felmdrav theme for Hugo! on Felmdrav - A Hugo Theme

item.title: Felmdrav Theme – First Public Release
item.description:
The Felmdrav Hugo theme is now officially released.

Felmdrav is designed with a clear focus on minimal structure, explicit configuration, and flexible content presentation. Built on Bootstrap 5, it supports a wide range of use cases—from simple blogs to more complex, content-driven websites.

Key features include a configurable grid system, reusable content blocks, flexible content listings, and curated Featured Posts for prominent content placement.

This first public release establishes a solid foundation for further development. While the theme will continue to evolve, it is already intended for real-world use and customization.

item.title: Featured Posts Announcement
item.description:
With the latest updates to the Felmdrav theme, we’re introducing Featured Posts — a simple way to highlight selected content where it matters most.

Featured Posts allow you to draw attention to important articles, announcements, or updates without mixing them into the regular blog flow. Instead of relying on automatic ordering, featured content is explicitly curated, making it ideal for landing pages or front pages.

Whether you want to promote a major release, an editorial highlight, or a key announcement, Featured Posts give you full control over how and where important content is presented.

Fusce et finibus nunc. Praesent non nisl ex. Duis dapibus ut lacus et pellentesque. Vestibulum tristique consequat facilisis. Nulla semper aliquet elit, vel lobortis leo mattis sed. Suspendisse viverra nulla eros, in ornare mi pellentesque quis. Pellentesque ante nibh, consectetur eget dui sed, tincidunt iaculis eros. Proin vitae tellus vitae lorem porta dictum. Proin augue ipsum, feugiat in ante ut, sodales interdum lorem. Integer ut aliquet enim. In auctor, velit eu ultricies malesuada, ante erat pulvinar odio, ut cursus nibh risus in ipsum. In bibendum varius egestas. Donec tincidunt odio at lacinia sagittis.

item.title: Feedback
item.description: Feel free to add some senseful content here.

Announcement

Felmdrav Theme – First Public Release

January 10, 2026

The Felmdrav Hugo theme is now officially released.

Read More
Announcement

Felmdrav Theme – First Public Release

January 10, 2026

The Felmdrav Hugo theme is now officially released.

Read More
Theme

Featured Posts Announcement

January 9, 2026

With the latest updates to the Felmdrav theme, we’re introducing Featured Posts.

item.title: About this theme
item.description:
This site demonstrates Felmdrav, a Hugo theme based on Bootstrap 5 with optional Bootswatch support.

The example site is intended as a theme showcase. It demonstrates common layouts, components, and configuration options to help you understand how the theme behaves and how it can be customized.

Documentation and source code

The complete documentation, configuration reference, and source code are available on GitHub:

  • https://github.com/geschke/hugo-felmdrav

Notes

This example site is not meant to represent a complete website.
Its purpose is to provide visual and structural reference for theme users.

item.title: Both sidebars (3 / 6 / 3)
item.description:
This page demonstrates a layout example with two sidebars using a 3 / 6 / 3 Bootstrap grid split.

This layout is primarily intended as a demonstration and may not be suitable for all content types.

Use cases may include pages that require additional navigation, filters, or contextual panels.

For configuration details and limitations, please refer to the README.

item.title: Components
item.description:
This page provides a visual reference for Bootstrap components and Bootswatch theme settings as used by the Felmdrav theme.

It is intended to help you evaluate typography, colors, form elements, buttons, and other UI components across different Bootstrap and Bootswatch themes.

Note: For demonstration purposes, this page intentionally uses the fixed-top navbar header variant instead of the hero header.

This makes it easier to focus on component styling without the visual influence of a hero image.

item.title: Post 02
item.description: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Nam laoreet nec justo at maximus. Vivamus at neque quis tellus feugiat imperdiet nec a augue. Integer nec nisi ultricies, vulputate leo ac, tristique quam. Suspendisse aliquet nec arcu et dictum. Ut in convallis felis. Fusce id congue tellus. Ut urna massa, varius a finibus a, pretium id felis. Praesent aliquet neque vel nisl luctus, ac lobortis urna porttitor. Sed ac ultricies mi. Nunc pellentesque ut magna ac dapibus.

item.title: Sidebar left (3 / 9)
item.description:
This page demonstrates a layout example with a left sidebar using a default Bootstrap grid split of 3 / 9 columns.

The sidebar typically contains secondary navigation, metadata, or contextual information, while the main content area uses the wider column.

This page is intended as a layout reference for theme users.
For configuration details and customization options, please refer to the README.

item.title: Sidebar right (4 / 8)
item.description:
This page demonstrates a layout example with a right sidebar using an alternative Bootstrap grid split of 4 / 8 columns.

This example intentionally uses a different column ratio to show how flexible the layout can be depending on content needs.

This page is intended as a layout reference for theme users.
For configuration details and customization options, please refer to the README.
